en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Trade License or extract in the Czech Republic Trade Licensing Commercial Register Applicability Assessment questionnaire.

Most business activities (construction, retail, consulting, etc.) fall under the Trade Licensing Act No. 455/1991 Coll., §2–11. Professions excluded by §3 (e.g., law, medicine, architecture) follow other laws.

Please upload a current extract issued under Act No. 455/1991 Coll., §60–63 (Trade Register Entries). Must be dated within the last 90 days.

A company can access its trade licence and obtain extracts mainly via the Czech Trade Licensing Register and local Trade Licensing Offices.
Please upload your valid Trade License or Extract issued within the last 90 days.
